Container.Name: smart-garage
Container.Overview: Smart Garage — self-hosted vehicle management for Unraid. Maintenance, fuel analytics, expenses, documents, and reminders. One container, SQLite database, automatic updates via :latest image.
Container.Description:
**Smart Garage** helps you manage your cars from your own NAS — no cloud, no subscription.
**Features**
- Vehicle profiles with photos and odometer tracking
- Maintenance schedules, service log, due/overdue dashboard
- Fuel log with consumption charts and projected annual usage
- Expenses, document storage (PDF/receipts), reminders
- Dark/light theme, English and German UI
- Open local registration (first user becomes admin)
**First run**
1. Install and start the container
2. Open the WebUI
3. Register your account
4. Add your first vehicle
**Updates:** Docker → smart-garage → **Force Update** (pulls `latest` from GHCR).
**Backup:** archive the AppData folder (`smart-garage.db` + `uploads/`).
Docs: https://github.com/flizzy27/smart-garage/blob/main/docs/UNRAID.md
Container.Changes: ### 2026-06-19 — v0.3.0 - Production release for Community Applications - Configurable web port and upload limits - Auto-updates via ghcr.io/flizzy27/smart-garage:latest

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: SQLite database and uploads. Created automatically by Unraid.
